title: Developer Onboarding Checklist Generator
problem: Small teams onboard inconsistently and lose time to repeated setup issues.
scope: Generate project-specific onboarding checklists from repository metadata.
mvp: CLI command that outputs a markdown checklist for one repository
nextAction: Interview 3 engineering managers — Done when: interview notes include repeated onboarding blockers.

title: OSS Release Notes Assistant
problem: Maintainers spend too much time writing release notes manually.
mvp: Aggregate merged PR titles and labels into a release-notes draft
nextAction: Define release notes sections - Done when: template covers features, fixes, and breaking changes.
